---
title: "Random Musings"
listing:
  contents: posts            # Quarto auto-discovers all .qmd files in posts/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default              # try: grid, table, default
  categories: true           # renders category filter chips
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true                 # generates an RSS feed at blog/index.xml
page-layout: full
---
